---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in a free online tool, the landing page, or documentation
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Which tool is affected?

- [ ] Currency Calculator (https://vacurim.com/tools/currency-calculator/)
- [ ] Manuscript Digitizer (https://vacurim.com/tools/free-digitizer/)
- [ ] Landing page (index.html on GitHub Pages)
- [ ] README / documentation
- [ ] Other (please specify): 

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- Device: [e.g. desktop, iPhone 14]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.

> **Note:** This repository only covers the **free online tools** and the **landing page**. Bugs in the **premium desktop applications** (Swiss Codex, Vatican Codex, Suite) should be reported to support@vacurim.com directly.
